puzzle.title: The Sculptor of a Golden Lie
puzzle.intro: A figure emerges in the absence of a great leader, seizing a moment of weakness. With skilled hands and a deceptive tongue, this individual crafts an object of worship, testing the faith of a nation and leading many down a path of misguidance. Uncover the story of this artisan of apostasy.
clues: I was among the people who were delivered from a great tyrant across the sea.
I perceived something the others did not; a trace left behind by the heavenly messenger.
I gathered a handful from that special trace, knowing it held a strange power.
Using the people's own jewelry, I fashioned a hollow body that produced a sound.
I presented my creation, a calf, and declared, 'This is your god and the god of Musa, who has forgotten!'
When the prophet returned in anger, my fate was sealed: to live as a pariah, forever saying, 'Let there be no touching.'

trial.label: What Was My Act?
options: Building a tower to the heavens

location.label: What Was the Key Element?
options: A staff that became a serpent
A rock that gushed twelve springs

outcome.label: What Was My Punishment?
options: Drowned in the sea with an army
Swallowed by the earth with my wealth
Cursed to be a lifelong outcast
Struck by a mighty blast from the sky
outcome.answer: Cursed to be a lifelong outcast

puzzle.arabic: فَأَخْرَجَ لَهُمْ عِجْلًۭا جَسَدًۭا لَّهُۥ خُوَارٌۭ فَقَالُوا۟ هَـٰذَآ إِلَـٰهُكُمْ وَإِلَـٰهُ مُوسَىٰ فَنَسِىَ
puzzle.verse: And he extracted for them [the statue of] a calf which had a lowing sound, and they said, "This is your god and the god of Moses, but he forgot." (20:88)
